images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful young Japanese female model with a top-tier gravure idol aesthetic, radiating a cozy and intimate vibe while sitting at a window seat in a high-end café overlooking a vibrant neon city night. She is playfully winking at the camera with a cute yet seductive expression, her large expressive eyes sparkling under the bright moonlight glow that ensures the scene is clear and professional without heavy shadows. She wears a trendy, unbuttoned beige trench coat draped over her shoulders to reveal a form-fitting lace bodysuit that accentuates her slim waist and ample chest, the delicate fabric texture contrasting with her flawless skin visible with faint pores and vellus hair. The background is a colorful, high-saturation bokeh of city lights and neon signs, creating a dreamy urban atmosphere. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts
